tool_input.command: test -f /Users/erwenchen/agentic_OS/.env && echo ".env exists" || echo ".env MISSING"; test -f /Users/erwenchen/agentic_OS/.env && grep -c '^ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=' /Users/erwenchen/agentic_OS/.env || true; crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -i loop || echo "(no loop entry in crontab)"
tool_input.description: Check .env existence, key presence count, and crontab loop entry
